untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of anomalies contradicting >1 year of baseline expectations and conditional analytical validation logic (scale in if validates, exit if refutes). The 2.5σ deviation and 250% volume threshold can be approximated using price_pos_20 (<0.025 or >0.975 for extreme deviations) and vol_ratio_20 (>3.5), but the core logic—comparing current behavior against a full year of learned baseline patterns and conditional decision trees based on rapid 5-minute analysis—cannot be expressed with point-in-time technical indicators alone. This requires machine learning or dynamic baseline modeling outside the allowed indicator vocabulary.
translation_notes: Approximated 2.5σ deviation using price_pos_20 extreme values (0.025 and 0.975, representing ~98th and 2nd percentile). Approximated 250% volume deviation using vol_ratio_20 > 3.5 (roughly 3.5× normal). Position trimming (25% reduction) and conditional scale-in logic cannot be encoded in static entry/exit rules. Exit condition uses returns as proxy for analytical validation outcome. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because original signal requires long or short determination based on which direction violated the anomaly threshold.
